The policyholder can choose the option of SPW anytime during the policy term including at policy inception. As per IRDAI Filing, SPW can only be chosen if the policy term is >=10 years. However, as per risk feedback, SPW should be allowed only for PT >= 15 years.
No
Policyholder can modify or opt-out of the facility by notifying the company.
a)   The policyholder will have the option to choose:
(i)The start of the SPW which can be anytime after 5th policy year
(ii)Any specified date as per his/her choice for the SPW payout

(iii)As per IRDAI Filing, The percentage of Fund Value s/he wants as SPW from 1% to 12% p.a. However, as per risk feedback, % of FV should be allowed only from 1% to 6% p.a.This percentage can be changed anytime

(iv)The frequency of the SPW i.e. yearly, half yearly, quarterly or monthly, where the above %-age will be split over the number of instalments in a year. The SPW frequency can be changed at any policy anniversary
b)   Each instalment of SPW will be equal to the chosen percentage of Fund Value## divided by the frequency of SPW

c)    On systematic partial withdrawals, eligible Top Up premium units (if any) would be en-cashed first from the Top Up premium fund value(2) on First in First out (FIFO) basis before allowing partial withdrawals from the regular premium fund value
d)  For the purpose of systematic partial withdrawals, each payment of Top Up premium (if any) shall have a lock-in period of five (5) years from the date of payment of each Top Up premium
e)   The SPW will be payable till the end of the remaining policy term or till the policyholder terminates the option, subject to availability of fund.
f)    The fund value after any SPW will not be allowed to drop below 2X of Annualized Premium.
g)   In case the fund value drops below 2X of Annualized Premium, the SPW will be discontinued and the customer has to be sent an intimation of the same.
h)   The customer can opt for SPW again by revising the percentage.

i)     In the Investor Selectable Portfolio Strategy, the policyholder will have the option to choose the fund he wants to do systematic partial withdrawals from. If the Wheel of Life Portfolio Strategy, Trigger Based Portfolio Strategy & Auto Transfer Portfolio Strategy is in inforce, withdrawal of units from each fund will be done in the same proportion as the value of the Units held in that Fund as on date of withdrawal. The policyholder will not have any choice to opt the fund from which the partial withdrawal of units is to be done
j)     All charge including mortality charges (as applicable in the policy) shall be deducted during the period.
k)   Partial withdrawals will also be allowed anytime, as per the partial withdrawal conditions.
l)     In case of minor life, SPW will be allowed after Life assured attaining age 18 years.
· The policyholder will have an option to surrender the policy completely, anytime during the SPW period
